completed_slices.summary: Recorded PUB-01B validation-run evidence in the designated evidence document only, including run id, worker-only scope, bootstrap baseline, regression-test result, and required daemon post-finalization review checks.

acceptance_status.criterion: The worker makes only an evidence-note change in docs/design/evidence/pub-01a-bootstrap-exception-2026-07-06.md; no product code changes are made by this validation slice.
acceptance_status.evidence: Only docs/design/evidence/pub-01a-bootstrap-exception-2026-07-06.md changed; commit e6cd8743cc09f574d586a11cc7fa77d6992e0b12 contains 8 doc-only insertions and no product code, daemon lifecycle code, publication code, or tests.

acceptance_status.criterion: The existing regression test final_sha_advertises_publication_commit_with_close_records passes under slice verification and the full integration gate.
acceptance_status.evidence: Worker ran khazad-doom slices validate --repo . successfully and cargo test final_sha_advertises_publication_commit_with_close_records --quiet successfully. Full integration-gate attestation remains daemon-owned after merge/finalization.

acceptance_status.criterion: After daemon finalization, operator review verifies handoff final_sha, final-report final_sha, and implementation-summary final_sha all equal git rev-parse of the run's integration branch.
acceptance_status.evidence: Evidence note now names run kd-20260706-222759-58cf471c and records the exact post-finalization review requirement for handoff, final-report, implementation-summary, and integration branch tip equality; daemon/operator must attest after publication.

acceptance_status.criterion: At the advertised final_sha, git show can read .workflow/slices/PUB-01B.json with status=closed and closed_by_run equal to the validation run id.
acceptance_status.evidence: Evidence note records that the advertised final_sha must contain closed .workflow/slices/PUB-01B.json metadata for run kd-20260706-222759-58cf471c; daemon finalization must create and attest this closure commit.

acceptance_status.criterion: At the advertised final_sha, git show can read the validation run's committed .workflow/reports/<run>-final-report.json and .workflow/reports/<run>-implementation-summary.json artifacts.
acceptance_status.evidence: Evidence note records the required committed report artifact paths for run kd-20260706-222759-58cf471c; daemon finalization must publish and attest those artifacts at advertised final_sha.

assumptions: The run handoff represents the restarted installed daemon validation path required by the slice.
Post-finalization equality and git-show checks are intentionally daemon/operator-attested after the worker commit; the worker did not approve its own finalization evidence.
